name: wilson-checkpoint
description: Never lose work to a usage limit / rate-limit / crash. A Claude Code hook cannot see the limit event, so this keeps a always-fresh non-destructive snapshot instead: on Stop / PreCompact / SessionEnd it runs `git stash create` (a dangling commit — working tree, index and branches untouched), pins it under refs/wilson-checkpoint/, and writes a resume note. SessionStart re-injects an unconsumed snapshot so the next session continues. Restore/list/clear via /wilson-checkpoint:checkpoint. Opt out: SIDECAR_NO_CHECKPOINT=1.
